subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Qásim! This day belongeth unto Truth and hath been mentioned in the divine Books as the Day of God. Should any soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالقاسم امروز بحق منسوبست و در کتب الهی بیوم الله مذکور اگر نفسی در آنچه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
